rules.explanation: 来源于 ZDB 内置启用规则：样线不足3条。
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM "YD_TRCY_PT" WHERE YD_ID = :ydId AND (MZGUID IN(SELECT D.MZGUID FROM (SELECT A.MZGUID,C.YXSL FROM YD_TRCY_PT A LEFT JOIN (SELECT B.XB_GLH,COUNT(B.XB_GLH) AS YXSL FROM YX_TRCY_TB B GROUP BY B.XB_GLH) C ON A.MZGUID=C.XB_GLH) D WHERE D.YXSL<3))

rules.title: 样线长度不一致

rules.title: 天然草原样地面积不是 0.125
rules.explanation: 天然草原样地面积统一填写为 0.125。
rules.sql: SELECT YD_ID, MIAN_JI AS actualValue FROM "YD_TRCY_PT" WHERE YD_ID = :ydId AND (MIAN_JI IS NULL OR CAST(MIAN_JI AS REAL) <> 0.125)

rules.title: 中心桩 GNSS 坐标 X 位数异常
rules.explanation: 中心桩 GNSS 坐标 X（米）的整数部分必须为 8 位。
rules.sql: SELECT YD_ID, ZUOBIAO_X AS actualValue FROM "YD_TRCY_PT" WHERE YD_ID = :ydId AND (ZUOBIAO_X IS NULL OR LENGTH(CAST(ROUND(ABS(ZUOBIAO_X), 0) AS INTEGER)) <> 8)

rules.title: 中心桩 GNSS 坐标 Y 位数异常
rules.explanation: 中心桩 GNSS 坐标 Y（米）的整数部分必须为 7 位。
rules.sql: SELECT YD_ID, ZUOBIAO_Y AS actualValue FROM "YD_TRCY_PT" WHERE YD_ID = :ydId AND (ZUOBIAO_Y IS NULL OR LENGTH(CAST(ROUND(ABS(ZUOBIAO_Y), 0) AS INTEGER)) <> 7)

rules.title: 植被盖度低于 60%
rules.explanation: 植被盖度小于 60% 时提示人工检查核对。
rules.sql: SELECT YD_ID, CDGD AS actualValue FROM "YD_TRCY_PT" WHERE YD_ID = :ydId AND CDGD IS NOT NULL AND CAST(CDGD AS REAL) < 60

rules.sql: SELECT YD_ID, ZBGD AS actualValue FROM "YD_TRCY_PT" WHERE YD_ID = :ydId AND ZBGD IS NOT NULL AND (CAST(ZBGD AS REAL) < 5 OR CAST(ZBGD AS REAL) > 100)
